item.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer at GammaCloud
item.description:
GammaCloud is a Series B startup building developer tooling. We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer.
Stack: Node.js, React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, AWS.
You will be working with a small team of 12 engineers spread across Americas and Asia Pacific. We are truly async-first: no timezone requirements whatsoever.
Salary: $130,000 - $170,000 USD/year + equity. Contractors and employees both welcome. We work with PEO.

item.title: DevOps Engineer at DeltaOps
item.description:
DeltaOps needs a DevOps Engineer with AWS and Terraform experience.
Must be located in the United States or Canada. Valid work authorization required.
Salary: $110,000 USD/year.

item.title: Product Designer at EpsilonDesign
item.description:
EpsilonDesign is looking for an experienced Product Designer (5+ years).
Location: Worldwide. Async-first.
Figma, user research, design systems experience required. Salary range: $90,000 - $120,000.
